title: Radial Seasonality Clock — polar projection
blurb: A polar seasonality clock — average per-tick return by cyclic phase bin, drawn as a radial line loop with spokes and a baseline ring. The engine has no native polar transform; (angle, radius) is projected to cartesian (x=r·cosθ, y=r·sinθ) at manifest-build time and drawn with the ordinary line2d@1 pipeline.

legend.label: Angle θ = session phase (bin 0 = 3 o'clock, CCW)
